name: Bundle Synthesis
when_to_use: Consolidate every area artifact produced for this opportunity into one cross-area brief.

name: Stage-Filtered Synthesis
when_to_use: Filter area artifacts by stage (pre-idea / idea / build / launch / scale) and emit a stage-specific brief.

name: Investor-Lens Synthesis
when_to_use: Consolidate area artifacts through the investor lens — market quality, unit economics, defensibility, risk concentration.
